info.title: Redline Combat Simulator CLI
info.description: A professional-grade combat simulator and balance tuning tool for game designers and modders. Run dungeon simulations, perform difficulty sweeps, and analyze game balance metrics.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: Redline Health Check CLI - Available Commands:

options.name: --party
options.description:
Party ID (required)
[--format text|json]      Output format (default: text)
[--iterations <int>]      Iterations for determinism (default: 1)
[--key-file <path>]       Optional signing key file
